message:
refactor(server): replace auth barrier with spin-wait, parse CallToolResult

Replace the std::sync::Barrier-based synchronization in the auth echo
tool and http_read_only_snapshot_keeps_request_auth_isolated test with
an AtomicUsize spin-wait pattern. The barrier approach required exact
participant counts and a Mutex-guarded Option, which was fragile when
test thread counts changed. The new approach uses a simple atomic
counter: each concurrent request increments AUTH_READY_COUNT, then
spin-waits (with 1s timeout) until the count reaches 2, proving overlap.

Also fix the response parsing in the test: the HTTP handler now returns
a proper CallToolResult JSON (with is_error + content array) rather than
a bare string. Parse with serde_json into CallToolResult and extract the
text content, adding an assertion that is_error is false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
